issue: Liquid `{% assign is_active = page.url == item.url %}` does not evaluate `==`; assign stored `page.url` (always truthy) so every nav-tree link rendered `.active`.
route: /docs/wargames/natas/  (a consumer site with a large curated _data/navigation tree: 19 groups + 200 children)
measurement: count of `aside.bd-sidebar .nav-tree .nav-tree-link.active` in the raw server-rendered HTML (no client JS)
how_produced: Two real Jekyll builds of the same site: BEFORE with nav-tree.html reverted to origin/main, AFTER at this PR's HEAD. user_overrides disabled to isolate theme rendering.
